name: freeze-markdown
description: Saves a Markdown Preview as a single, self-contained HTML file.
author: belonesox

commands.title: Export Markdown to HTML (Show Save Dialog)

freeze-markdown.autoSaveOnSave.description: Automatically save a frozen HTML file every time a Markdown file is saved.

freeze-markdown.outputSuffix.description: The file suffix to use for exported HTML files (e.g., '.html' or '.frozen.html').

freeze-markdown.embedWebResourcesOnManua.description: Embed External Resources on Manual Export

freeze-markdown.embedWebResourcesOnAutoS.description: Embed External Resources on Auto Save

freeze-markdown.embedLocalResourcesOnMan.description: Embed local resources (CSS/JS/images) directly into the HTML on manual export. If false, resources are cached in '.vscode/.cache' and linked relatively.

freeze-markdown.embedLocalResourcesOnAut.description: Embed local resources directly into the HTML on auto save. If false, resources are cached and linked relatively.

freeze-markdown.templatePath.description: Optional. Path to a custom HTML template file to use for exporting. If null, a default template is used.

freeze-markdown.createDebugFile.description: Creates an additional `.debug.html` file before embedding resources. Useful for debugging style issues.
